column1: # prompt<TAB>expect   (expect = gear number 1-5, or "silent")
# ── trivial / inline ──
fix the typo in the site header
read this file and tell me what it does
# ── Gear 2 — distinct concerns fan out ──
review the auth module and write tests for the validation
explora o código e desenha a arquitectura nova
# ── Gear 2 — same concern must NOT fire (synonym guard) ──
debug and fix this null pointer
# ── Gear 3 — sweeps (incl. spelled numbers, each, single-digit+noun) ──
migrate every page in app/ to the new router
audita todo o codebase à procura de vulnerabilidades
refactor all the API handlers across the repo
process these 40 records the same way
convert all 50 of these to typescript
update the docs for these twelve endpoints
go through each handler and add logging
process this list of 200 customers
translate the site into all 8 languages
faz tudo isto
trata de tudo
de forma autónoma migra os ficheiros
# ── Gear 4 — background (incl. EN duration) ──
run the full integration test suite and report failures
corre toda a suite de testes em segundo plano
do a deep research pass on this topic while I work
run the e2e tests, they take 20 minutes
# ── Gear 5 — scheduled / watch ──
keep checking the deploy and ping me when it's live
every morning send me a digest
lembra-me de verificar isto daqui a uma hora
watch the PR and merge when green
# ── negative controls — bare code-nouns must stay SILENT (no cry-wolf) ──
explain how monitor works in this code
document the cron parser i wrote
what does this poll function do
is this a recurring payment bug
remind me how git rebase works
write a function to scrape one url
# ── meta / already-named ──
how does the upshift hook work
run a workflow that refactors the handlers
